title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/prompts.py (第 260 至 560 行，共 797 行) ---
 260 |         "symbol": ["符号表查询规范"],
 261 |         "list": ["符号表查询规范"],
 262 |     }
 263 | 
 264 |     # 3. 提取任务关键词
 265 |     task_keywords = set(task_description.lower().split())
 266 | 
 267 |     # 4. 匹配相关段落
 268 |     relevant_sections = []
 269 |     for keyword in task_keywords:
 270 |         if keyword in task_section_mapping:
 271 |             for section_name in task_section_mapping[keyword]:
 272 |                 if section_name in sections and section_name not in relevant_sections:
 273 |                     relevant_sections.append(section_name)
 274 | 
 275 |     # 5. 如果没有匹配，注入默认段落
 276 |     if not relevant_sections:
 277 |         # 默认注入最常用的规范
 278 |         default_sections = ["文件编辑工具选择规范", "测试驱动规范 (TDD)"]
 279 |         relevant_sections = [s for s in default_sections if s in sections]
 280 | 
 281 |     # 6. 限制注入数量
 282 |     relevant_sections = relevant_sections[:max_sections]
 283 | 
 284 |     # 7. 组装注入内容
 285 |     if relevant_sections:
 286 |         injected_content = "\n### 项目特定规范 (CLAUDE.md - 按需注入):\n"
 287 |         for section_name in relevant_sections:
 288 |             injected_content += f"\n{sections[section_name]}\n"
 289 |         return injected_content
 290 | 
 291 |     return ""
 292 | 
 293 | 
 294 | # ==================== 格式化函数 ====================
 295 | 
 296 | def format_episodic_memory(episodic_memories: List["SessionSummary"], max_items: int = 5) -> str:
 297 |     """
 298 |     格式化情景记忆为可读文本（压缩格式）
 299 | 
 300 |     Args:
 301 |         episodic_memories: 情景记忆列表
 302 |         max_items: 最多显示多少条
 303 | 
 304 |     Returns:
 305 |         格式化后的文本（压缩单行格式）
 306 |     """
 307 |     if not episodic_memories:
 308 |         return ""
 309 | 
 310 |     lines = []
 311 |     lines.append("### 🧠 情景记忆 (Episodic Memory):")
 312 |     lines.append("最近的任务摘要（按重要性排序）：")
 313 |     lines.append("")
 314 | 
 315 |     for i, ep in enumerate(episodic_memories[:max_items], 1):
 316 |         # 压缩格式：✅ [时间] 核心描述 → 文件变更 (错误数)
 317 |         status_icon = "✅" if ep.task_status == "completed" else "⏳"
 318 | 
 319 |         # 时间压缩：2026-04-25T15:21:52 → 04-25 15:21
 320 |         time_str = ep.timestamp[5:16].replace('T', ' ') if len(ep.timestamp) >= 16 else ep.timestamp[:19]
 321 | 
 322 |         # 核心描述：优先使用摘要，其次目标（取前60字符）
 323 |         core_desc = ""
 324 |         if ep.summary_text:
 325 |             core_desc = ep.summary_text[:60]
 326 |         elif ep.task_goal:
 327 |             core_desc = ep.task_goal[:60]
 328 | 
 329 |         # 文件变更：最多显示3个文件名
 330 |         files_str = ""
 331 |         if ep.files_changed:
 332 |             files = [f.path.split('/')[-1] for f in ep.files_changed[:3]]
 333 |             files_str = ", ".join(files)
 334 |             if len(ep.files_changed) > 3:
 335 |                 files_str += f" +{len(ep.files_changed)-3}"
 336 | 
 337 |         # 错误数：仅在有错误时显示
 338 |         errors_str = ""
 339 |         if ep.errors_encountered:
 340 |             errors_str = f" ({len(ep.errors_encountered)}错误)"
 341 | 
 342 |         # 组装压缩行
 343 |         line = f"{status_icon} [{time_str}] {core_desc}"
 344 |         if files_str:
 345 |             line += f" → {files_str}"
 346 |         line += errors_str
 347 | 
 348 |         lines.append(line)
 349 | 
 350 |     return "\n".join(lines)
 351 | 
 352 | 
 353 | def format_session_summaries(session_summaries: List["SessionSummary"], max_items: int = 3) -> str:
 354 |     """
 355 |     格式化会话摘要为可读文本（压缩格式）
 356 | 
 357 |     Args:
 358 |         session_summaries: 会话摘要列表
 359 |         max_items: 最多显示多少条
 360 | 
 361 |     Returns:
 362 |         格式化后的文本（压缩单行格式）
 363 |     """
 364 |     if not session_summaries:
 365 |         return ""
 366 | 
 367 |     lines = []
 368 |     lines.append("### 📚 会话摘要 (Session Summaries):")
 369 |     lines.append("历史会话的关键信息：")
 370 |     lines.append("")
 371 | 
 372 |     for i, summary in enumerate(session_summaries[:max_items...
